headline: Echoblast Opens New Datacenter in Sterling VA
rendered_text:
# ECHOBLAST, INC.
## Company Overview & Investor Information

**Document Date:** January 2025  
**Classification:** Public Information

---

## CORPORATE STRUCTURE

**Legal Entity:** Echoblast, Inc.  
**State of Incorporation:** Delaware (C-Corporation)  
**Headquarters:** 500 Sansome Street, San Francisco, California 94111  
**Primary Domain:** echoblast.ai  
**Founded:** January 2025  
**Accelerator:** Y Combinator Winter 2025 (YC W25)

---

## EXECUTIVE LEADERSHIP

| Position | Name |
|----------|------|
| Chief Executive Officer | Will Coleman |
| Chief Technology Officer | Mark Howell |
| President | Angela Holmes |
| Chief Architect | Mark Leonard |

---

## PUBLIC MARKET INFORMATION

**Stock Ticker:** EBLA  
**Exchange:** NASDAQ  
**IPO Date:** Q1 2030  
**Status:** Public Company

---

## BUSINESS DESCRIPTION

Echoblast, Inc. operates an AI neocloud platform combining GPU rental services with managed training and inference capabilities. The company provides enterprise clients, researchers, and AI developers with scalable compute infrastructure and end-to-end machine learning operations support.

**Core Service Offerings:**
- GPU rental and compute capacity
- Managed model training infrastructure
- Inference platform services
- Related cloud AI services

---

**For additional information, visit echoblast.ai**
